title: Lead Investment Banker at Motilal Oswal

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Motilal Oswal
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Motilal Oswal in Lucknow is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Motilal Oswal:
Motilal Oswal is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Motilal Oswal!
